author: mark
text:
Resolve plugin dispatcher contract

Settles bl-8452 (§6) into bl-2e26: subprocess-uniform dispatch (tracker is a fully separate reference binary, no in-process path); a plugin is only a binary, self-describing via 'protocol'; the symlink folder config/plugins/<op>.{pre,post}/ IS the registry — no plugins config list.

Portability solved with a two-level stitch: committed RELATIVE link NN-<name> -> ../bin/<name> (mode-independent), local absolute bin/<name> -> this machine's binary (gitignored, never committed). Missing binary = dangling bin/<name> = clean error.

bl plugin install lays both links + validates requested ops against live protocol (version check fires here). Recursion guard BALLS_PLUGIN_DEPTH suppresses plugins on nested ops (not refuse). Reads are no longer special-cased: every op has hook dirs, reads are plugin-free only because nothing is linked there by default.
